name: radial
label: Radial
info: N rotations about the centre - a kaleidoscope.

name: mirror
label: Mirror
info: Reflect across a line through the centre, at any angle.

name: concentric
label: Concentric
info: Scaled copies nested into rings about the centre.

name: spiral
label: Spiral
info: Copies wound around the centre into a log spiral.

name: tile
label: Tile
info: Repeat the motif across a lattice.
